Designer

I value simple content structure, clean design patterns, and thoughtful interactions.

Developer

I like to code things from HTML/CSS and enjoy bringing ideas to life in the browser.

I genuinely care about people, and love helping fellow designers work on their craft.

“Mian Waleed was a real pleasure to work with and we look forward to working with him again. He’s definitely the kind of designer you can trust with a project from start to finish.”

“He's a clear communicator with the tenacity and confidence to really dig in to tricky design scenarios and the collaborative friction that's needed to produce excellent work.”

Sam Smith, Newyork

My new site created by Waleed just launched. They've done a great job of creating exactly what I wanted. Easy to work with and very responsive. They met all of my expectations.
